title: German Shrimp and Wonton Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful soup that combines the richness of German cuisine with the delicate taste of wontons, featuring succulent shrimp as the main ingredient.
instructions: In a large pot, cook the crispy bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the cooked bacon from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion, carrots, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked.
Add the wonton wrappers to the pot and cook for 2-3 minutes or until they start to soften.
Add the chicken broth, white wine, and heavy cream to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Return the cooked bacon to the pot and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Cook the wontons according to package instructions and serve on top of the soup.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
